utility_evaluation.REASONING: The format requires 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package, all 7 items are present. Each item is fully detailed: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) provided; travel_dates (specific dates, September 25–29, 2024) provided; transportation (flight details with costs and origin airport) provided; accommodation (hotel name, description, cost per night, and total) provided; activities (type, duration, inclusion details, and cost) provided; additional_services (description, location, cost per meal, and total) provided; total_budget (complete breakdown per item and remaining budget) provided. Therefore, all items are included and fully specified.
